name: Coverage Path Planning: Classical Foundations, Recent Advances, and Future Directions

description: arXiv:2607.10649v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Coverage path planning (CPP) is a fundamental problem in robot motion planning, whose aim is to produce robot trajectories that provide complete coverage of target workspaces while minimizing task-specific objectives such as path length, overlap, number of turns, and energy consumption. CPP has widespread applications in cleaning, inspection, ma...
author: Zongyuan Shen, Shalabh Gupta, Shancheng Zhao, Dehua Zhou, Gao Wang, Zhongqiang Ren, Yaming Ou, Yikui Zhai, C. L. Philip Chen
